properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When did God, ever leave you? When did He, ever forsake you? He is always there for you His grace is always sufficient for you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just hold on, don`t you ever let go For His promises are sure He said that He will go, and prepare a place for us And come again to take us away.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Over there, on the other side I will sing of His praise and worship And forevermore, I'll be at His side And will never be apart in His presence

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God did never, ever leave you He never did, and will never forsake you He is always there for you His grace is always sufficient for you
